ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text:
noodles (76,5%) [wheat flour, palm oil, modified starch, salt, raising agents (sodium carbonates, potassium carbonates),] liquid sauce (20%) [soy sauce (41%) (water, soy beans, wheat, salt), sunflower oil, cane molasses and inverted sugar syrup, sugar, flavour enhancers (e621, e635), fried garlic, flavours (contain milk), ginger, yeast extract, colour: e150c, onion powder, acidity regulator: citric acid],  garnish (3,5%) [carrot, onion, chicken meat pieces (0,7%)], 
product may contain: crustaceans, molluscs, sulphur dioxide and sulphites, fish, eggs, celery, mustard, sesame,
